title: Creamy Yeasty Norwegian Pork Casserole
description: A festive Norwegian dish featuring doubanjiang and rest-meat in a creamy yeasty sauce, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat and cook the pork shoulder until browned on all sides.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, yeast, and a pinch of salt.
Gradually add the sour cream and chicken broth to the bowl, whisking until smooth.
Add the doubanjiang, salt, and pepper to the bowl and stir to combine.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange a layer of the cooked pork shoulder.
Pour the creamy yeast mixture over the pork shoulder.
Dot the top of the casserole with the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 30 minutes or until golden brown on top.
